hero.badge: The Vision Layer for Modern Apps
hero.title: Chain Visual Logic,
hero.description: Stop writing fragile prompt wrappers, handling multi-modal latency, and parsing messy Markdown strings. Chain your visual logic, define your JSON schema, and deploy a production-grade vision engine in 60 seconds.

features.title: Built for Engineering Teams
features.description: Powerful features designed to streamline your document processing workflows

structuredOutput.title: Structured Output
structuredOutput.description: Define custom extraction schemas and receive clean, structured JSON data ready for your applications.

multiLanguage.title: 70+ Languages
multiLanguage.description: Native support for over 70 languages including complex scripts like Arabic, Chinese, Japanese, and more.

apiFirst.title: API-First Design
apiFirst.description: RESTful APIs with SDKs for all major languages. Integrate in minutes, not days.

batchProcessing.title: Batch Processing
batchProcessing.description: Process thousands of documents simultaneously with our scalable infrastructure.

customModels.title: Custom Models
customModels.description: Train custom extraction models for your specific document types and formats.

analytics.title: Real-time Analytics
analytics.description: Monitor usage, track accuracy, and optimize your document processing pipelines.

languages.title: Global Language Support
languages.description: Native support for 70+ languages with high accuracy

about.title: Engineered for Speed. Built for Production.
about.description: TAED is designed to solve the complex challenges of visual intelligence across different document types, formats, and industries. Our AI-powered platform understands context, handles complex visual data, and extracts structured JSON with unprecedented accuracy.

cta.title: Ready to Ship Vision Logic?
cta.description: Join thousands of engineering teams using TAED to automate their visual intelligence pipelines.
cta.note: No credit card required. $10 free credit included.

footer.description: The Vision Layer for Modern Apps. Chain visual logic, define JSON schemas, and deploy production-grade vision engines.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.description: Have questions about TAED? We'd love to hear from you. Send us a message and we'll respond as soon as possible.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: What file formats do you support?
faq.a1: We support PDF, PNG, JPG, TIFF, BMP, and WebP formats. Documents can be scanned images or digital files.
faq.a2: Our OCR achieves 99.5%+ accuracy on clear documents and 95%+ on challenging scans, with continuous improvements through AI.
faq.a3: Yes! We offer a comprehensive REST API with SDKs for Python, JavaScript, Go, and more. Check our documentation for details.
